───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• PR #100 is green again.

  I fixed the brittle release-please guardrail in /Users/matt/.ajax-dev/
  worktrees/ajax-cli-cbeb640c/release-please-pr100-workspace-versions/crates/
  ajax-cli/src/lib/tests.rs. The test no longer hard-codes 0.7.4; it now
  derives the expected linked release line from crates/ajax-cli in the
  manifest, and I added a focused regression test to lock that behavior in. I
  pushed commit 3c44100 directly to release-please--branches--main, so the fix
  is part of PR #100 and will land on main when that release PR merges.

  Tests added or updated:

  - Added
    release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_release_line
  - Updated release_please_registers_workspace_crates_for_library_only_changes

  Validation I ran:

  - Red phase:
      - rtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib
        tests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_rele
        ase_line -- --exact --nocapture
  - Green phase:
      - rtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib
        tests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_rele
        ase_line -- --exact --nocapture
      - rtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib
        tests::release_please_registers_workspace_crates_for_library_only_chang
        es -- --exact --nocapture
  - Full local validation:
      - rtk cargo fmt --check
      - rtk cargo check --all-targets --all-features
      - rtk cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
      - rtk cargo nextest run --all-features
      - rtk cargo doc --no-deps --all-features
      - RUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings' rtk cargo doc --no-deps --all-features
      - rtk cargo audit
  - Repo hook during commit also passed its full verification set.

  Commands that failed:

  - rtk proxy cargo test -p ajax-cli --lib
    tests::release_please_workspace_crate_seeds_follow_the_current_cli_release_
    line -- --exact --nocapture
      - Failed as expected in the red phase because the temporary brittle
        expectation returned 0.7.4 while the regenerated release manifest was
        0.8.0.
      - Fixed by deriving the seed line from manifest["crates/ajax-cli"].

  Remote result for https://github.com/mossipcams/ajax-cli/pull/100:

  - Format and Duplication: success
  - Cargo Check: success
  - Clippy: success
  - Nextest and Doc Tests: success
  - Documentation: success
  - Cargo Audit: success
  - Smoke: success
  - aggregate CI: success
  - mergeStateStatus: CLEAN

  Limitation:

  - cargo audit still reports the same 2 allowed warnings already present in
    the repo (ansi_term unmaintained and yanked aes 0.9.0), but the command
    completed successfully and this fix did not change that baseline.
